payload.update: Sector authority code confirmed: this category earns trust through systems/infrastructure/engineering language and explicitly forbids 'creative agency', 'social media gurus', 'viral hacks' (0892998a74c42faf:P0318).
Category maturity: 'category_creation' stage — Arika competes by defining and owning a category, not by feature comparison (0892998a74c42faf:P0318).

Economic model is retainer-based ($15K-$50K/mo Tier 1) and premium-pricing-justified; branding must be framed as revenue infrastructure, aligning with named outcomes Revenue Growth / Premium Pricing / Retention (64b03e2fbe1458d9:P0394).
Governance discipline is ROCBO: direct, revenue-mathematics-driven, anti-fluff; anti-patterns include no unqualified outreach and no fulfillment without monetization logic (governance_rules:1).

Structural fact: Kenya-based serving clients globally requires an engineered cultural translation layer that preserves identity across cultures (f57573b8d788d1e1:P0006) — but market-perception evidence for this is MISSING.
Open dependency: the 15-dimension weighted scoring rubric must be retrieved/supplied before any scoring output is valid.

Arika Agency operates under ROCBO (Revenue-Oriented Cognitive Business Operations) governance with anti-patterns: no meaningless meetings, no vanity tasks, no random content, no fake productivity, no outreach without qualification, no fulfillment without monetization logic (governance_rules:1).

Arika sector self-definition: B2B Revenue Infrastructure / GTM Systems Agency, Kenya-based serving globally, with a 3-tier ICP (Tier 1 Series A-C $5M-$50M ARR $15K-$50K/mo retainer; Tier 2 Post-Seed-Series A founder-led selling; Tier 3 multi-location niche verticals — Healthcare, Real Estate Brokerages, Franchise Systems).
